summary: Profile updates were degraded for customers after a failed deployment rollback.

severity.rationale: Customer-facing degradation or high error rate in an important flow.

evidence.text: Profile updates were degraded for customers after a failed deployment rollback.
Customers could not reliably save profile changes for 29 minutes. Approximately 9% of profile update requests failed.

contributing_factors.description: A deployment changed feature flag routing for the profile service.

evidence.text: A deployment changed feature flag routing for the profile service. The rollback procedure was missing a step to restore the previous flag configuration and caused continued request failures.

contributing_factors.description: The rollback procedure was missing a step to restore the previous flag configuration and caused continued request failures.

evidence.text: A deployment changed feature flag routing for the profile service. The rollback procedure was missing a step to restore the previous flag configuration and caused continued request failures.

action_items.description: Add a pre-deploy validation check for profile feature flag routing.

evidence.text: Add a pre-deploy validation check for profile feature flag routing.
A deployment changed feature flag routing for the profile service. The rollback procedure was missing a step to restore the previous flag configuration and caused continued request failures.

action_items.description: Document the rollback procedure for profile service releases.

evidence.text: Document the rollback procedure for profile service releases.
A deployment changed feature flag routing for the profile service. The rollback procedure was missing a step to restore the previous flag configuration and caused continued request failures.

supporting_evidence.text: Customers could not reliably save profile changes for 29 minutes. Approximately 9% of profile update requests failed.
A deployment changed feature flag routing for the profile service. The rollback procedure was missing a step to restore the previous flag configuration and caused continued request failures.
The team restored the previous feature flag configuration and verified successful profile updates.

14:03 UTC - Deployment completed for the profile service. | 14:09 UTC - Error rate alert fired for profile update requests. | 14:18 UTC - Team attempted rollback and saw the same errors. | 14:31 UTC - Feature flag routing was restored. | 14:38 UTC - Profile update error rate returned to normal.
